name: INR / USD Exchange Rate
description: The rupee's exchange rate against the US dollar, the reference point for import costs, foreign travel, and dollar-denominated debt. India's rupee has depreciated gradually over the past decade, with the RBI managing the pace rather than defending a fixed level.
source: Reserve Bank of India, reference rate
releaseSchedule: Trades continuously; month-end reference rate shown here.

chart.title: A managed, gradual descent
chart.subtitle: INR per USD, RBI reference rate, month-end
